channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Constitutional Court ruling revives Phala Phala impeachment process, Ramaphosa pledges cooperation
item.description: President Cyril Ramaphosa has affirmed his full cooperation with constitutional processes following the Constitutional Court's ruling that Parliament must refer the independent panel’s Phala Phala rep...

item.title: Understanding the Word 'ASAP': May 9, 2026 Word of the Day
item.description: ABS-CBN Lifestyle presents the 'Word of the Day' for May 9, 2026, focusing on the commonly used term 'ASAP.' This feature aims to help readers expand their vocabulary and understand everyday expressio...

item.title: Isa Pantami rejects APC consensus, vows to challenge Gombe governorship process
item.description: Former Communications and Digital Economy Minister, Isa Ali Pantami, don cause political gbege after e burst cry because APC no gree give am Gombe State governorship ticket. The party select businessm...

item.title: Understanding the Grey Rock Method for Managing Difficult or Narcissistic Relationships
item.description: The 'grey rock' method is a strategy for dealing with individuals who exhibit narcissistic, toxic, or abusive behaviour, particularly in personal or professional relationships. The technique involves ...

item.title: US Commission Recommends India Be Classified as Country of Particular Concern Over Religious Freedom

item.title: US Government Releases UFO Files Including Moon Landing Observations
item.description: The Trump administration has released the first batch of files relating to UFOs and 'unidentified anomalous phenomena,' providing the public with previously unseen information and images. The document...

item.title: Lexus Unveils Six-Seater Electric SUV TZ, Potentially Heading to South Africa
item.description: Lexus has revealed its latest flagship electric vehicle, the TZ, a three-row luxury SUV that could eventually be sold in South Africa. Designed with families in mind, the TZ offers six seats and a spa...

item.title: Study finds higher-strength medicinal cannabis linked to increased psychiatric side effects
item.description: Recent research in Australia has highlighted potential risks associated with prescribing medicinal cannabis products that contain higher concentrations of THC (tetrahydrocannabinol), the compound resp...

item.title: Study Reveals How the Largest Black Holes Form Through Repeated Collisions
item.description: Recent research led by Cardiff University suggests that the Universe’s largest black holes are not born directly from collapsing stars but grow through successive collisions within dense star clusters...

item.title: South Bow Reports Increased Demand for Oil Exports to U.S. Gulf Coast
item.description: Calgary-based South Bow Corp. has reported that demand for shipping crude oil through the southern leg of its Keystone pipeline system to the U.S. Gulf Coast remains strong. Richard Prior, South Bow’s...

item.title: TV shows increasingly depict menopause as a natural stage of life
item.description: For decades, menopause on television was often treated as a source of humour, with sitcoms using it for comedic effect. However, recent series such as 'Your Friends & Neighbours' are beginning to port...

item.title: Nairobi Pastor Declines Cult Offer Worth KSh 2.4 Billion, Stays True to Faith

item.title: Mark Otieno Odhiambo Prepares for African Championships with Faith and Family Support

item.title: Rotimi Amaechi Obtains ADC Presidential Nomination Form Ahead of 2027 Elections
item.description: Former Minister of Transportation, Rotimi Amaechi, don collect him presidential nomination form for the African Democratic Congress (ADC) as dem dey prepare for the 2027 general elections. Naija News ...
